productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Black Backpack
description: Style Note If you want a bag that's funky, stylish, super cool and comfortable to carry around all day, check out this black backpack from united colors of benetton. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with your friends. A stunningly good looking bag, with loads of space, it'll become your best buddy in no time. Be prepared to be swept off your feet by this awesome backpack! Product Details Made of 95% nylon and 5% polyurethane on the outside and 100% polyester on the inside for durability Has two main compartments One small zipped pocket on the top One zipped pocket with organizer pouches and an inner zipped pocket One small zipped pocket at the bottom of the bag Two mesh bottle holders on the sides Two adjustable straps on the front with click clasps Padded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuries Ergonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortably Branded zips and sliders for easy use Branding embroidered on the front Material and Care Blended Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Size Height: 50 cm Width: 42 cm Depth: 8 cm
